title: Combining 2 dates into a timeline in a Subitem
excerpt:
Hey y’all! 
I need a way to either auto-calculate timelines. For my use cases, it can be either based on dates, or based on other changes I make to my subitems. (Ex. From changing to Working on It → Done) I know their is…

posts.author: CalebPrince (Caleb Prince)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey y’all!

I need a way to either auto-calculate timelines. For my use cases, it can be either based on dates, or based on other changes I make to my subitems. (Ex. From changing to Working on It → Done) I know their is an app that auto-calculates dates into a timeline (Start + End = Timeline). The problem is that it is not supportive of Subitems. Any recommendations will be greatly appreciated.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @CalebPrince

The app Start + End = Timeline has a “sister app” called Sync Subitem Timeline that works solely for subitems.
